_note: Slottable (active) Champion Point stars per constellation. Confirmed from build data + general ESO knowledge. Verify completeness against UESP or in-game for U50+.

warfare.name: Arcane Well
warfare.effect: Increases Magical Resistance based on the number of nearby enemies (max 3).

warfare.name: Blessed
warfare.effect: Increases the effectiveness of your healing done.

warfare.name: Cleansing Revival
warfare.effect: When you Resurrect an ally, removes negative effects from them.

warfare.name: Deadly Aim
warfare.effect: Increases the damage of your Light and Heavy Attacks.

warfare.name: Duelist's Rebuff
warfare.effect: Chance to gain Major Evasion for 3s when hit by a Direct damage attack.

warfare.name: Elemental Aegis
warfare.effect: Increases your Flame, Frost, Shock, and Magic Resistance.

warfare.name: Elfborn
warfare.effect: Increases the damage of your Critical Strikes.

warfare.name: Fighting Finesse
warfare.effect: Increases your Critical Strike damage and healing done.

warfare.name: Hardy
warfare.effect: Reduces damage taken from Physical, Poison, and Disease attacks.

warfare.name: Ironclad
warfare.effect: Reduces damage taken from Direct damage attacks.

warfare.name: Master-at-Arms
warfare.effect: Increases the damage of your Direct damage attacks.

warfare.name: Piercing
warfare.effect: Increases your Spell and Physical Penetration.

warfare.name: Reaving Blows
warfare.effect: Your successful melee hits have a chance to restore Stamina.

warfare.name: Siphoning Spells
warfare.effect: Successful attacks have a chance to restore Magicka.

warfare.name: Thaumaturge
warfare.effect: Increases the damage of your Damage over Time effects.

warfare.name: Tireless Discipline
warfare.effect: Increases your Weapon and Spell Damage.

fitness.name: Bloody Renewal
fitness.effect: Increases the healing you receive from Vampire abilities.

fitness.name: Bracing Gusts
fitness.effect: Reduces the cost of your Block.

fitness.name: Defiance
fitness.effect: Reduces the duration of Stun, Knockback, and Disorient effects on you.

fitness.name: Fortified Brass
fitness.effect: Increases your Physical and Spell Resistance.

fitness.name: Hasty Retreat
fitness.effect: Gain Major Expedition for 6s after you Break Free.

fitness.name: Hero's Rebuke
fitness.effect: Interrupting an enemy restores Stamina and Magicka.

fitness.name: Infused Weapon
fitness.effect: Light and Heavy Attacks have a chance to increase your Weapon and Spell Damage for 5s.

fitness.name: Juggernaut
fitness.effect: Reduces damage taken while you are Stunned, Knocked Back, or Disoriented.

fitness.name: Mystic Tenacity
fitness.effect: Reduces the duration of Silence and Dispel effects on you.

fitness.name: Pain's Refuge
fitness.effect: Gain a damage shield when your Health drops below 50%.

fitness.name: Rejuvenation
fitness.effect: When a resource drops below 20%, restore a portion of that resource (30s cooldown).

fitness.name: Slippery
fitness.effect: Reduces Snare duration and the cost of Break Free.

fitness.name: Sustained by Suffering
fitness.effect: Your Damage over Time effects have a chance to restore Health, Stamina, or Magicka.
